name: What should improved Siri performance look like in real life?
description: Better Siri should complete everyday tasks more reliably, especially reminders, texting, navigation, and calendar actions.

mainEntity.name: What should improved Siri performance look like in real life?

acceptedAnswer.text: You should notice better completion rates for repeat tasks like texting, reminders, navigation, and calendar updates. Siri should also become more useful for follow-up commands when your settings and phrasing are consistent. If nothing changes after several tests, the issue is likely outside Siri settings.
acceptedAnswer.description: Better Siri should complete everyday tasks more reliably, especially reminders, texting, navigation, and calendar actions.
